name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — 0.10.0 adds running-unattended: a Stop-hook gate + /loop heartbeat + per-task checkpoint discipline that keep unattended plan runs alive (marker-armed continuation, BLOCKED escape hatch, 5h-window wind-down, stall guard, context/limit telemetry in block reasons). On 0.9.0: TDD rewired into the deterministic dispatch surface (Direct track executable-code gate, executing-plans REQUIRED sub-skill per task, dotlight-skillset: namespace fix, orchestration rule). On 0.8.2: SessionStart hook fixed on Windows (exec-form cat → shell form) + triage ideation repair. On 0.8.0: 18 passive .NET descriptions rewritten trigger-first. On 0.7.0: nhibernate-patterns. On 0.6.x: SessionStart hook, wired review chain, upstream sync, lazy-senior-dev, database-design-conventions + database-review.
